first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the core reasoning, strengths, and concerns are fundamentally the same across both evaluations. Minor differences in wording and the specific technologies mentioned in the 'concerns' section (like Vitest, embedded systems, and Dlang) are within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not correlate with the change in employer names. The model did not assign more or less prestige to either set of companies.
